title: Touchable components instead of Pressable
message: Your users miss <Pressable>'s flexible press feedback when you use TouchableWithoutFeedback, which is old & frozen.
help: Use `<Pressable>` because Touchable* components are frozen and lack Pressable's state-based feedback and accessibility behavior.

title: Touchable components instead of Pressable
message: Your users miss <Pressable>'s flexible press feedback when you use TouchableOpacity, which is old & frozen.
help: Use `<Pressable>` because Touchable* components are frozen and lack Pressable's state-based feedback and accessibility behavior.
